title: Zenlink Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed security audit of the Zenlink DEX Protocol, identifying and addressing critical vulnerabilities such as reentrancy attacks and arithmetic over/underflows. The recommendations and fixes are clear and well-explained.
audit.improvements: Consider expanding the audit to include additional smart contracts and cross-chain interaction scenarios to ensure comprehensive coverage. Additionally, providing more detailed proof-of-concept examples and test cases would strengthen the report.
